_comment: EXAMPLE pricing config for the GLOBAL subscription deployment (BILLING_MODE=subscription). The repo's config/pricing.json is the Indonesia (one_time, IDR) config; the global deployment supplies THIS shape via PRICING_CONFIG_JSON env or PRICING_CONFIG_PATH pointing here. Loaders fall back per-key to code defaults, so anything omitted keeps the dodo_subscriptions.mjs / credit_catalog.py defaults. Edit values to re-price without a code change.
_subscription_plans_note: Per-period RESET target (credits) + USD price + the env var holding the Dodo product id. Matches the locked global plan table. 'free' is grant-only (500 once per email at signup, no product). These DEFAULT-match dodo_subscriptions.mjs; listed here so the deployment owns them as config.
_topup_packs_note: One-time top-up packs (ADD to the topup bucket; PAID plans only — Free is rejected at /topup/create). credits + USD price + the env var holding the Dodo ONE-TIME product id. DEFAULT-match dodo_subscriptions.mjs.
_tier_rank_note: GLOBAL 5-tier ladder (feeds python credit_catalog.tier_at_least AND the Node mode-gate). 'enterprise' is ALIASED to rank 4 (= ultra) so the hardcoded 4K resolution-lock (video_min_tier returns 'enterprise' for 2160/3840) maps to Ultra on this deployment. tenants.plan is set to the plan_key on subscribe; tier_at_least compares ranks. Top-up does NOT change tier.
_model_min_tier_note: LOCKED 2026-06-25 (Rino ketok, spec §FEATURE GATING global > registry Indonesia). Which tier unlocks each REGISTRY model (only models that actually exist in credit_catalog.py — Imagen/DALL·E/Recraft are NOT user-facing models, dropped). Unmapped model → 'pro' (fail-closed). Recraft is NOT a picker model — it is gated by MODE (mode_min_tier), see below.
_mode_min_tier_note: LOCKED 2026-06-25 (Rino ketok). SEPARATE map from model_min_tier — gates the VIDEO-INSTANT MODE (not a registry model). Enforced BACKEND at /api/video/assemble BEFORE hold/charge (403 feature_not_available) + mirrored in the UI (disable+tooltip). Recraft access is gated HERE (Color=starter+, Realistis/detail=plus+) — there is no Recraft model picker. Lineart=free NEVER calls Recraft (worker skips it). Unmapped mode → 'pro' (fail-closed). Keys: visualMode (full_images/hybrid/full_clips) + whiteboard genres prefixed 'wb:' (wb:lineart/wb:color/wb:detail/wb:diagram).
_concurrency_note: Optional per-tier concurrent-render caps for the 5-tier ladder.
